  "findings": [
    "Non-IC rated recessed luminaire (can light) installed in direct contact with thermal insulation."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace the non-IC rated luminaire with an IC-rated fixture, or clear insulation to maintain a minimum 3-inch clearance around the fixture."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Section 410.116(B) requires that recessed luminaires installed in contact with insulation be identified as Type IC. Non-IC rated fixtures must have a clearance of not less than 3 inches from combustible materials and thermal insulation to prevent overheating and fire hazards.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 410.116(A)(1)",
    "NEC 410.116(B)"
  ]
}
